task.json description and verifier.py logic verify allergy, vitals, and appointment

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic Synthea data for patient Mateo Matías (DOB: 1946-07-19). The agent acts as a Clinical Nurse Specialist in cardio-oncology. The required documentation gaps are: an allergy to "iodinated contrast" resulting in "urticaria" (moderate severity); vitals including BP 128/78, weight 72 kg, pulse 66, and temp 37.2 C; and scheduling a follow-up appointment within 28 days. The verifier uses an export script to confirm these actions.
